sentiment.reasoning: Jorvyl Securities withdrawing from a market due to unfavorable conditions suggests a negative impact on revenue, though it could be a strategic move to cut losses.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
